prestazioni: Replacement of the original XK 3.4L inline-6 (engine code: XK6) with a fully balanced and blueprinted version featuring a forged crankshaft (JE Pistons 87mm forged slugs, 10.5:1 compression), ported and polished cylinder head with oversized stainless steel valves (Ferrea Racing 43mm intake/38mm exhaust), and a custom camshaft profile (Jaguar Heritage 300° duration, 0.450" lift) for optimized airflow at 7,000 RPM redline

Installation of a bespoke fuel system comprising dual Weber 45 DCOE carburetors (with velocity stacks and 36mm chokes) fed by an Aeromotive Stealth 340 fuel pump, paired with a custom-machined aluminum intake manifold (designed by RCR Racing) to maximize throttle response and mid-range torque

Chassis reinforcement via a T45 steel tube frame (fabricated by RML Group) with integrated roll cage, lightweight aluminum body panels (replacing original steel, saving ~120 lbs), and a custom 4-wheel independent suspension setup featuring Öhlins TTX40 coilovers (adjustable damping, 2-way compression/rebound), spherical bearing control arms (SuperPro), and a limited-slip differential (Quaife ATB helical LSD) for improved power delivery
estetica: Hand-formed aluminum bodywork with a custom widebody conversion (inspired by the 1953 Le Mans-winning C-Type, fabricated by RS Panels) featuring riveted fender flares, a lowered roofline, and a functional rear diffuser (carbon fiber, designed by KW Automotive) for aerodynamic stability at high speeds

Period-correct magnesium wheels (replica Dunlop Racing 16" x 5.5" front/16" x 6.5" rear, produced by Borrani) wrapped in Avon CR6ZZ tires (5.50L-16 front, 6.00L-16 rear) for authentic vintage racing aesthetics with modern grip levels

Custom livery in British Racing Green with gold pinstriping (applied by Signwave UK), featuring hand-painted Jaguar Heritage racing numbers (white with black outline) and a functional hood scoop (aluminum, NACA duct design) for optimized airflow to the Weber carburetors
